LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ABM SERVICE INC. & ABM INDUSTRIES INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 13, 2013, TO BE HEARD AT 9:30 A.M. THE COURT VACATES ITS RULING OF SEPTEMBER 30, 2013, SUSTAINING THE DEMURRER AS UNOPPOSED. THE COURT WAS UNAWARE THAT THE PARTIES INTENDED TO HAVE THE DEMURRER HEARD ON OCTOBER 11, 2013. THE MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE DEMURRER (MOVING PAPERS) WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT HAS THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185 (302)
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALONSAG, ROSEMARIE RAINEY JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 14.0 DAYS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-20-2013 CONTINUED TO JAN-08-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ABM SERVICE INC. & ABM INDUSTRIES INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE FIRST AND FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED.DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FEHA RACE DISCRIMINATION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND, IF PLAINTIFF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE FACTS THAT PLAINTIFF EXHAUSTED HER ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND, IF PLAINTIFF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO PLEAD FACTS REGARDING THE DISCOVERY OF ALLEGED DEFAMATORY STATEMENTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-31-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Continued To Jan-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ABM SERVICE INC. & ABM INDUSTRIES INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained as to the first and fifth cause of action with leave to amend. Defendants' request for judicial notice is granted.Defendants' demurrer to the first cause of action for FEHA race discrimination is sustained with leave to amend, if Plaintiff can do so in good faith, to allege facts that Plaintiff exhausted her administrative remedies. Defendants' demurrer to the fifth cause of action is sustained with leave to amend, if Plaintiff can do so in good faith, to plead facts regarding the discovery of alleged defamatory statements. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Continued To Nov-13-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs ABM SERVICE INC. & ABM INDUSTRIES INC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to November 13, 2013, to be heard at 9:30 a.m. The Court vacates its ruling of September 30, 2013, sustaining the demurrer as unopposed. The Court was unaware that the parties intended to have the demurrer heard on October 11, 2013. The moving party is ordered to provide a courtesy copy of the demurrer (moving papers) with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The Court has the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Continued To Nov-20-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS ABM SERVICE INC. and ABM INDUSTRIES INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained, with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)
